name: Grilled Veal Chops Pizziaola
recipeIngredient: 1 can Italian plum tomatoes with basil, drained and coarsely chopped (reserve juice)
8 Anchovy fillets, pounded to smooth paste
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat veal chops dry and rub with oil, oregano, salt, and pepper.
2. Arrange the chops in a single layer in a baking dish and set aside at room temperature for 2 hours.
3. Heat olive oil in a heavy or non-stick large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add onion and cook until wilted.
5. Stir in chopped tomatoes, garlic, sugar, basil, and oregano. Increase heat to medium-high and cook until the juice evaporates, about 5 minutes.
6. Blend the reserved tomato juice with anchovy fillets. Partially cover and cook until thickened, about 10 minutes.
7. Stir in capers and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Grease a broiler pan and position about 3 inches from heat. Preheat the pan and broiler.
9. Transfer chops to the heated pan and cook, turning several times, until charred and crusty on the outside and juicy inside, about 10 minutes total.
10. Brush chops with any remaining marinade during the last several minutes of cooking.
11. Transfer chops to individual plates (warmed), evenly nap with sauce, sprinkle with parsley, and garnish with lemon wedges.
12. Makes 4 servings.
